# CWE-1265 positive: nested lock on same mutex (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1265-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1265: Unintended Reentrant Invocation of Non-reentrant Code Via Nested Calls.
// Vulnerable: transfer handler re-enters UpdateBalance while mutex is already held.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

var ledgerMuPure sync.Mutex

func UpdateBalancePure(db *sql.DB, userID int, delta float64) error {
	ledgerMuPure.Lock()
	defer ledgerMuPure.Unlock()
	_, err := db.Exec(
		"UPDATE balances SET amount = amount + $1 WHERE user_id = $2", delta, userID,
	)
	return err
}

func PostTransferPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		from := r.Header.Get("X-From-User")
		amount := r.Header.Get("X-Amount")
		ledgerMuPure.Lock()
		_, _ = from, amount
		if err := UpdateBalancePure(db, 1, -10); err != nil {
			ledgerMuPure.Unlock()
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		ledgerMuPure.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	}
}
